name: hssf-monorepo
description: HTML Slide Simple Framework for Rikkei Education — monorepo

scripts.test: node --test packages/hssf/test/smoke.test.js packages/hssf/test/tokens.test.js packages/hssf/test/highlight.test.js packages/hssf/test/scale.test.js packages/hssf/test/navigation.test.js packages/hssf/test/fragments.test.js packages/hssf/test/layout.test.js packages/hssf/test/content.test.js packages/hssf/test/teaching-visual.test.js packages/hssf/test/terms-flow.test.js packages/hssf/test/build-output.test.js packages/hssf/test/sample-deck.test.js packages/hssf/test/docs.test.js packages/hssf/test/a11y.test.js packages/create-hssf/test/cli.test.js
scripts.ci: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run size && pnpm run test:e2e
